name: Ceramic Floor Tile Calculator
seo_title: How Many Floor Tiles Do I Need? Online
seo_description: Calculate how many ceramic floor tiles, boxes, adhesive and grout needed. Free tile calculator.
example_label: Calculatete boxes of 30x30cm ceramic tiles for a 25m² floor (8 pieces per box).

range_hints.area: Area to cover with ceramic tiles

result_context: For {area} m²: {piezas_ud} tiles needed, {cajas_ud} boxes or {area_merma_m2} m² with 10% waste.
formula_display: Tiles = Area / (tile_m x tile_m); Boxes = Tiles / pieces per box
steps: Calculatete area per tile: 0.30m x 0.30m = 0.09m² per tile
mistakes: Not accounting for cutting waste (10% straight lay, 15% diagonal)
Not verifying all boxes are from the same batch (color variation risk)
Not planning starting tile position to optimize edge cuts
description: Ceramic Floor Tile Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
